_output_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — target filesystem path for the marshalled artifact.

_phase_status.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — workflow state (drives C4 requirements-table branch).

field_name.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Zod field path emitted in this column.

header_text.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — text printed in the header row.

width.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — preferred column width in Excel units.

type_hint.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Excel cell-type hint for the marshaller.

required.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — whether marshaller should error on null.

items.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — single column-layout instruction (first-class per C5).

_columns_plan.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — optional layout instructions (first-class per C5).

field_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — dotted path within the phase schema (e.g., "rows[].math_derivation").

introduced_in.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — schema semver where this field was added.

rationale.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — reviewer-facing reason the insertion was made.

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — KB file that motivated the insertion, if any.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — methodology insertion (first-class per C5).

_insertions.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — optional methodology insertions applied to this phase (first-class per C5).

phase_number.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — methodology phase number (0-12) per plan §4.5.

phase_slug.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — URL-safe slug (e.g., "requirements-table"). Also the xlsx sheet slug.

phase_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — human-facing phase title (e.g., "Phase 6 — Extract Requirements Table").

schema_version.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — Zod schema semver (e.g., "1.0.0") for drift-detection.

project_id.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — parent project id; keys workbook + PDF filename.

project_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — project display name; rendered at top and used as xlsx workbook title.

author.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — emitting agent or human reviewer identifier.

generator.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — tool that produced this artifact (e.g., "product-helper@0.1.0").

revision.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — monotonic revision counter per (project, phase).

constants_namespace.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Header — logical grouping namespace for these constants (e.g., "M2.NFR", "M2.COMPLIANCE").

req_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Header — requirement id ("UC01.R01".."CC.R99") per C12 pattern.

text.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Header — natural-language requirement statement.

requirement_class.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Header — class carries the math-gating rule (flag B).

artifact.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — artifact identifier within the phase (e.g., "UC03.R02", "PC-01").

relationship.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — kind of link to the source artifact.

note.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — reviewer-facing context for the link.

source_ucbd.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — originating UCBD artifact (C11).

artifact.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — artifact identifier within the phase (e.g., "UC03.R02", "PC-01").

relationship.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — kind of link to the source artifact.

note.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — reviewer-facing context for the link.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — cross-phase reference (also_appears_in / source_ucbd unified per C11).

also_appears_in.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — downstream phases that reference this requirement (C11).

formula.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — LaTeX-like or plain-English formula (e.g., "p95 = base + queueing_delay(λ, μ)").

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — KB filename (matches softwareArchRefSchema or "inline") that sourced the formula.

kb_section.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — optional heading/anchor within the KB file (e.g., "§P95 envelope").

result.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — computed value, if the formula is evaluated at generation time.

math_derivation.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — required when requirement_class is numeric (flag B NUMERIC_ONLY).

ref.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — FMEA-early failure-mode id (e.g., "FM.04").

anyOf.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — NFR derived from an FMEA-early failure mode.

ref.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — data-flow entry id (e.g., "DE.08").

anyOf.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — NFR derived from a data-flow pii/criticality attribute.

ref.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Header — requirement id ("UC01.R01".."CC.R99") per C12 pattern.

anyOf.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — NFR derived from a functional requirement (budget/latency implication).

derived_from.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Provenance — upstream FMEA / data-flow / FR that demanded this (N)FR (T-new Wave-2-mid).

constant_name.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Header — SCREAMING_SNAKE constant identifier (e.g., AVAILABILITY_TARGET).

value.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Header — numeric or text-valued constant (see plan §4.5.4 text-constants rule).

unit.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Header — unit for numeric constants (e.g., "%", "ms", "req/s").

ref.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — KB file this decision cites.

rationale.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — why this decision maps to the numeric target.

tradeoffs.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — explicit trade-offs accepted (e.g., latency vs consistency).

alternatives_rejected.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — alternatives considered and rejected, with one-line reason.

software_arch_decision.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — optional KB-grounded design decision (flag A — 12-ref enum).

description: x-ui-surface=page-header — base phase envelope extended by every Module 2 phase.
title: Phase8ConstantsTable
